Responsible.title: Responsible
Responsible.description: Volunteers or administrative responsible parties who can manage letters and generate access codes

id.description: Unique identifier of the responsible volunteer

whatsapp.description: Whatsapp contact number of the volunteer

avatarUrl.description: URL to the avatar of the volunteer

AccessCode.title: AccessCode
AccessCode.description: Pre-paid access vouchers used to unlock drafting and sending elegant letters

createdAt.description: The date/time the code was generated

status.description: Current state of the pre-paid code

Letter.title: Letter
Letter.description: Elegance letters written for the Festa Junina festival containing greetings, roses, or sweets

senderName.description: Optional sender name when anonymity is active

status.description: Current status of delivery or revision

readAloud.description: Whether the user wants their letter content read aloud in the school patio

AllowedAdmin.title: AllowedAdmin
AllowedAdmin.description: A VIP VIP list of allowed administrative emails authorized to enter the secure admin dashboard

responsibles.description: Collection of community members authorized to volunteer and administer affairs

codigos_arraial.description: Prepaid codes generated by volunteers and consumed by letter writers

cartas_arraial.description: Secure, decoupled database of anonymous letters submitted for arraial festival delivery

allowedAdmins.description: Secure authorized administration login registry for VIP email authorization
